vercelLinkage.rootDirectoryWarning: If Vercel Root Directory is aion-com (legacy), builds fail and production stays stale — set to repo root (.)
vercelLinkage.notes: Production alias serves cached deployment ~22h old (X-Vercel-Cache HIT). Git push does not update production until redeploy.

lastProductionDeploy.notes: Production missing /operations/* (404). GitHub master has routes; CI build passes. Vercel production not redeployed.

deploymentTimeline.summary: Root cause: stale production alias, not routing bug. VERCEL_TOKEN missing in GitHub; local CLI token invalid. vercel-production.yml deploy step fails.

pipelineBlockers: VERCEL_TOKEN not in GitHub secrets — vercel-production.yml deploy step fails instantly
Local Vercel CLI token expired (invalidToken) — cannot CLI deploy from agent
Vercel Git auto-deploy not promoting new builds to aion-com.vercel.app

ownerUnblock.stepA_vercel_git: Vercel → aion-com → Settings → Git: repo osminoog09-star/aion-project, Production branch master, Root Directory empty (.)
ownerUnblock.stepB_deploy_hook: Vercel → Deploy Hooks → Production → copy URL → GitHub secret VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK (enables vercel-deploy-hook.yml)
ownerUnblock.stepC_token: OR: vercel.com/account/tokens → GitHub secrets VERCEL_TOKEN + VERCEL_ORG_ID + VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
ownerUnblock.stepD_cli: OR: npx vercel login && npm run deploy:vercel

autonomousRecovery: After stepB: push triggers vercel-deploy-hook.yml → production redeploy
